cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value remote work options and flexible schedules that support their personal lives.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Positive feedback highlights a collaborative environment and a sense of community among teams.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff appreciate investment in professional development and leadership that fosters growth.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees report satisfaction with compensation packages and company-funded training.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel respected and secure in their roles, noting fair treatment.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Negative reviews cite inflexible schedules and a lack of support for family needs.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Feedback points to exhaustion and dissatisfaction with pay relative to industry standards.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees express frustration over limited advancement opportunities and perceived favoritism.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report feelings of isolation and unprofessional management behavior.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of toxic environments and high-stress conditions impact employee well-being.
